allow: Bash(python -c " import json f = open\('/c/Users/johnny/.pi/agent/sessions/--C--Projects-github-pi-mono--/2026-04-27T01-17-15-510Z_e2ff3f0b-fdf2-47e6-826a-a3399ce6e0da.jsonl', encoding='utf-8'\) for i, line in enumerate\(f\): obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'message': role = obj.get\('role',''\) content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): text = ' '.join\(c.get\('text',''\) for c in content if isinstance\(c,dict\) and c.get\('type'\)=='text'\) else: text = str\(content\) print\(f'[{role}] {text[:120]}'\) if i > 30: break ")
